content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'none'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' blob: data: https:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https: wss:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; worker-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests;
